1/4/2026, updated on 4/4/2026: TINDAKMALAYSIA NETWORK SERVICES PLT (TINDAK MALAYSIA)
Local Council Elections 1962: Results & Statistics of Voting (by Election Commission). Refer to 1962_MALAYA_LOCAL_GOVERNMENT_ELECTION_OTHER_SOURCES

Candidate spellings follow EC spelling standards. There are gaps for candidate age and sex category.  No data available for the component parties for the Socialist Front. In the case of two-member wards, a ballot paper may be used to record two votes. In the case of three-member wards, a ballot paper may be used to record three votes. No Total Ballot Issued values for multi-member wards, as no information on unique ballot count was provided. Turnout level values reflect EC's reporting. The file of Election Details is a combination of EC-reported information and The Straits Times information. Voting Electorate refers to the electorate size of contested wards. Information for candidates losing deposits are guessed as the EC didn't provide detailed information. TindakMalaysia Network Services PLT is not responsible for any errors or omissions arising from the original data or its derivatives.
